seoDescription: ANR Roofing of Petaluma — a licensed, family-owned father-and-son roofing contractor serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2004. Residential and commercial re-roofs, leak repair, dry-rot and decking, inspections and maintenance. CSLB #849115.
heroHeading: Sonoma County's family-run roofing contractor since 2004
heroSubheading: ANR Roofing is a licensed, father-and-son roofing company in Petaluma — full-service residential and commercial roofing, leak repair and dry-rot work across Sonoma County, done on time and priced fairly.
aboutBody: ANR Roofing of Petaluma is a family-owned, father-and-son roofing company that has served Petaluma, Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County since 2004. Owner Eloy “Rigo” Rigoberto and his crew handle the whole job themselves, from the first inspection to the final cleanup.

From routine maintenance and leak repair to extensive dry-rot and decking replacement and complete residential or commercial re-roofs, ANR is known for doing careful, code-correct work on time and at a fair price. The company is fully licensed and insured under California contractor's license #849115.

services.title: Roof Repair & Leak Repair
services.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of leaks, storm damage and worn roofing — patched right so it lasts.

services.title: Re-Roofs & Replacement
services.description: Complete residential and commercial re-roofs in composition shingle, tile and flat systems.

services.title: Dry Rot & Decking
services.description: Expert repair of dry rot and damaged decking uncovered during tear-off, handled before the new roof goes on.

services.title: Inspections & Maintenance
services.description: Roof inspections and preventative maintenance to catch problems early and extend the life of your roof.

notes: Verified from public web research (BBB, Angi/HomeAdvisor 5.0, BuildZoom top-99%, Yelp 27 reviews, CSLB). CSLB license #849115 active to 11/30/2026. Owner Eloy 'Rigo' Rigoberto; father-and-son operation. Has only a thin SEO-template site (anrroofinginc.net) — 'bad website' target. No usable own photos found → photo-less editorial build. Address 2044 Willow Dr, Petaluma 94954; (707) 548-9576. Trust signal = verified CSLB license + licensed/insured credential (no fabricated reviews).
